meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle by mastering Claude Code. An advanced, founder-focused case study on rapid MVP deployment using Antigravity and AI.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap kills SaaS momentum. By leveraging Claude Code for rapid architecture generation and Antigravity for automated boilerplate, you can build production-grade modules in hours. This workflow transforms abstract ideas into verifiable, high-value assets that prove your technical authority to potential investors and paying customers immediately.
content.intro:
You have the vision, the market research, and the drive, but your GitHub profile is a digital ghost town. In the founder ecosystem, your portfolio is your currency. Without it, trust remains elusive, and your MVP sits in the 'someday' pile while competitors ship.

The friction isn't your capability; it's your execution velocity. By integrating Claude Code into your development loop, you stop writing boilerplate and start architecting solutions. This guide details how to leverage the Antigravity framework to transform your technical silence into a high-octane, revenue-ready product showcase.

steps.title: Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Define the SaaS scope to ensure the output is professional and modular.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js 14 architecture with TypeScript and Tailwind for a SaaS landing page with Stripe integration.

steps.title: Data Schema Definition
steps.description: Automate database schema creation to ensure data integrity from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a user-based subscription model including plans, usage limits, and transaction logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on antigravity specs'

steps.title: API Layer Implementation
steps.description: Build robust endpoints that serve as the backbone of your SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement secure Next.js API routes for user authentication and subscription status verification.

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Populate your UI with high-converting, reusable design components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive pricing table and feature comparison grid using Radix UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold ui components with antigravity styles'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Automate the path to production to prove your ability to ship.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Vercel deployment pipeline with environment variable validation for staging and production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure deployment scripts for production'

pro_tips: Treat your commit history as a narrative; use descriptive, professional commit messages that showcase your problem-solving logic.
Never ship unauthenticated code; use Claude Code to inject middleware security checks as a default project standard.
Focus on 'Vertical SaaS' features—niche functionality looks significantly more impressive to investors than generic CRUD apps.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost-mode' to generate unit tests alongside your features, proving your code is enterprise-ready.
Keep your repository README updated with a 'How to Deploy' section to demonstrate you build with the user experience in mind.
content.next_steps: After completing your first module, deploy it to a live Vercel URL and share it on LinkedIn or X with a focus on the business problem it solves. Iterate based on feedback, not features.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the lack of a portfolio delay your success. With these tools, you can build, deploy, and monetize faster than ever before. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
